description: Triggered when the user wants to write new marketing copy for any page — homepage, landing page, pricing, feature pages — especially for B2B tech and SaaS products.
should_trigger: Write homepage copy for our developer tools SaaS
Create a landing page for our free trial offer targeting CTOs
Write the hero section headline and subheadline for our design system product
I need pricing page copy that reduces 'which plan is right for me?' anxiety
Write a features page for our API monitoring tool
Create copy for our about page that tells our founding story
Help me write headlines using the PAS framework for our B2B product
should_not_trigger: Review and improve this existing copy that I already wrote
Write cold outreach emails to potential customers
Create a blog post about software architecture
Design a cancel flow with save offers for our SaaS
